feat.name: Terrifying Transformation
feat.prerequisite: *Werecreature Dedication*; you were afflicted with the curse of the werecreature
feat.text: Your flesh tears and warps as you transform. Attempt Intimidation checks to Demoralize each enemy within 30 feet. This Demoralize loses the auditory trait and gains the visual trait, and you don't take a penalty if a creature doesn't understand your language. Regardless of the results of your checks, each creature is temporarily immune to Terrifying Transformation for 1 minute.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Visual
traits.text: A visual effect can affect only creatures that can see it. This applies only to visible parts of the effect, as determined by the GM.
